---
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    comment: "#>"
    collapse: true
    echo: false
    message: false
    warning: false
    
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
#| cache: false

library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(knitr)

text <- 
read_html("https://tinyurl.com/588vkvc6") |> 
  html_elements(".docs-material") |> 
  html_text2() |> 
  pluck(1) |> 
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(value = value |> str_split("(\\\\n)*\\${3}(\\\\n)*")) |> 
  unnest(value) |>
  filter(str_starts(value, "#")) |> 
  rownames_to_column() |>
  mutate(value = value |> str_split("\\\\n+")) |>
  unnest(value) |> 
  mutate(value = str_replace_all(value, c("\\\\u0027" = "\u0027",
                                          "\\\\u003d" = "\\u003d")))
```
